---
title: "Boosted experiment"
author: "Manuel Rivera"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Vignette Title}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

# Description
This analysis focuses on the boosted approach to generate keystone datasets controls. 
In this method, we set off-diagonal interaction mantaining a proportion of zeros and non zeros result from a **-U(0,1)** creating a 
boosted effect on the interactions at column k. 
Boosted value is fixed to 10.

# Generate data
```{r, eval=FALSE}

dir = '/mnt/data/sur/users/mrivera/Controls/Boosted_keystone'
ext_dir = paste0(dir, "/ExtSummaries")
raw_outs_dir = paste0(dir, "/RawOutputs")
simulation_parameters = data.table::fread(paste0(dir, "/simulation-params.tsv"), select = c("id", "key", "p_noint"))


library(dplyr)
library(parallel)

process_row <- function(i) {
  #------------------------
  # Generate path
  row <- simulation_parameters[i, ]
  id <- row$id
  key <- as.numeric(row$key)
  p_noint <- as.numeric(row$p_noint)
  ext_file_path <- paste0(ext_dir, paste0("/ExtSummary_", id, ".feather"))
  ode_file_path <- paste0(raw_outs_dir, paste0("/RawOutput_", id, ".feather"))
  #------------------------
  # Generate relative abundance
  population <- arrow::read_feather(ode_file_path)
  relative_pop <- population[[ncol(population)]] / sum(population)
  #------------------------
  # Read extinctions file
  cols <- c("prop_extinctions", "dissimilarity_bc", "keystoneness")
  table <- arrow::read_feather(ext_file_path, col_select = all_of(cols)) %>%
    rename(n_extinctions = prop_extinctions) %>%
    rename(dissimilarity = dissimilarity_bc) %>%
    rename(keystoneness = keystoneness) %>%
    mutate(pop_initial = population[[1]]) %>%
    mutate(rel_pop_initial = relative_pop[[1]]) %>%
    mutate(prop_extinctions = n_extinctions / n()) %>%
    mutate(is_keystone = FALSE, p_noint = p_noint)
  # Add keystone
  table$is_keystone[key] <- TRUE
  table
}

results <- mclapply(1:nrow(simulation_parameters), process_row, mc.cores = detectCores() - 1)
full_summary <- do.call(rbind, results)
```

# Metric summary
```{r, eval=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

# Look at data
cols <- c("keystoneness", "dissimilarity", "prop_extinctions", "rel_pop_initial")
dat = full_summary %>% select(all_of(cols)) %>%   
  summarise(across(everything(), list(
    min  = ~min(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
    max  = ~max(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
    NAs  = ~sum(is.na(.x))
  )))  %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(),names_to  = c("variable", ".value"), names_sep = "_(?=[^_]+$)")
print(dat)

# Select cases where keystoneness is NA
# na_cases = full_summary %>% filter(is.na(keystoneness)) %>% mutate(expected_keystoneness = dissimilarity * rel_pop_initial)
# sum(is.na(na_cases$expected_keystoneness))

# # Which simulations failed?
# failed_sims = unique(na_cases$id)
```

# Metrics distributions
```{r, eval=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(ggridges)

# Define common theme and colors
theme_custom <- theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
        legend.position = "bottom",
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 10)
    )

colors <- c("FALSE" = "#4575b4", "TRUE" = "#d73027")  # Better color contrast

# Only plot these variables
variables_to_plot <- c("keystoneness", "dissimilarity", "prop_extinctions")

# Generate plot
library(tidyr)
plt = full_summary %>% select(is_keystone, all_of(variables_to_plot)) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = all_of(variables_to_plot), names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") %>%
    mutate(value = ifelse(value < 0, 0, value)) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = variable, y = value, fill = is_keystone)) +
    geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.6, outlier.shape = NA) +
    scale_y_continuous(trans = "log1p") +
    stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", color = "red", size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = colors, labels = c("Non-keystone", "Keystone")) +
    labs(x = "Metric", y = "Value", fill = "Species Type") +
    theme_custom


path = file.path("/mnt/data/sur/users/mrivera/Plots/Boosted_keys", "Metric_distributions.png")
if (!(dir.exists(dirname(path)))) { 
  dir.create(dirname(path), recursive = TRUE)
  print('>> Directory created\n')}
ggsave(path, plot = plt, width = 12, height = 5)
```

![Figure 1: Metrics distributions](/mnt/data/sur/users/mrivera/Plots/Boosted_keys/Metric_distributions.png)

# Metrics distributions separated by p_noint

```{r, eval=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(ggridges)
library(ggsignif)

# Define common theme and colors
theme_custom <- theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
        legend.position = "bottom",
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 10)
    ) +
    theme(
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        # Top labels (p_noint)
        strip.text.x = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", color = "white"),
        strip.background.x = element_rect(fill = "steelblue", color = NA),
        # Right labels (variable)
        strip.text.y = element_text(size = 11, face = "italic", color = "black", angle = 0),
        # strip.background.y = element_rect_round(fill = "#2c7fb8", color = NA)
    )

colors <- c("FALSE" = "#4575b4", "TRUE" = "#d73027")  # Better color contrast

# Only plot these variables
variables_to_plot <- c("keystoneness", "dissimilarity", "prop_extinctions")

# Generate plot
library(tidyr)
plt = full_summary %>% select(is_keystone, all_of(variables_to_plot), p_noint) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = all_of(variables_to_plot), names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") %>%
    mutate(value = ifelse(value < 0, 0, value)) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = is_keystone, y = value, fill = is_keystone)) +
    facet_grid(variable ~ p_noint, scales = "free_y") +
    geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.6, outlier.shape = NA) +
    scale_y_continuous(trans = "log1p") +
    # geom_signif(comparisons = list(c("TRUE", "FALSE")), map_signif_level = TRUE) + 
    stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", color = "red", size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = colors, labels = c("Non-keystone", "Keystone")) +
    labs(x = "Metric", y = "Value", fill = "Species Type") +
    theme_custom


path = file.path("/mnt/data/sur/users/mrivera/Plots/Boosted_keys", "Metric_grid.png")
if (!(dir.exists(dirname(path)))) { 
  dir.create(dirname(path), recursive = TRUE)
  print('>> Directory created\n')}
ggsave(path, plot = plt, width = 12, height = 5)
```

![Figure 2: Metrics distribution grid](/mnt/data/sur/users/mrivera/Plots/Boosted_keys/Metric_grid.png)

# Relative abundance vs metrics distribution for keystone species
```{r, eval=FALSE}
plt = full_summary %>% filter(is_keystone) %>% select(rel_pop_initial, keystoneness, dissimilarity, prop_extinctions) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = c(keystoneness, dissimilarity, prop_extinctions), names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") %>%
    mutate(value = ifelse(value < 0, 0, value)) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = rel_pop_initial, y = value, color = variable)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
    scale_y_continuous(trans = "log1p") +
    scale_x_continuous(trans = "log1p") +
    facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free_y") +
    labs(x = "Relative Abundance", y = "Metric Value", title = "Keystone Species: Relative Abundance vs Metrics") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

path = '/mnt/data/sur/users/mrivera/Plots/Boosted_keys/Relative-metrics.png'
ggsave(path, plot = plt, width = 12, height = 5)
```

![Figure 3: Relative abundance vs metrics](/mnt/data/sur/users/mrivera/Plots/Boosted_keys/Relative-metrics.png)

```{r, eval=FALSE}
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

plt = full_summary %>% filter(is_keystone) %>% select(rel_pop_initial, keystoneness, dissimilarity, prop_extinctions, p_noint) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = c(keystoneness, dissimilarity, prop_extinctions), names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") %>%
    mutate(value = ifelse(value < 0, 0, value)) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = rel_pop_initial, y = value, color = variable)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
    scale_y_continuous(trans = "log1p") +
    scale_x_continuous(trans = "log1p") +
    facet_grid(variable ~ p_noint, scales = "free_y") +
    labs(x = "Relative Abundance", y = "Metric Value", title = "Keystone Species: Relative Abundance vs Metrics by p_noint") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

path = '/mnt/data/sur/users/mrivera/Plots/Boosted_keys/Relative-metrics-facet.png'
ggsave(path, plot = plt, width = 12, height = 5)
```

![Figure 4: Relative abundance vs metrics separated by p_noint](/mnt/data/sur/users/mrivera/Plots/Boosted_keys/Relative-metrics-facet.png)

# Threshold analysis
```{r, eval=FALSE}

thresholds = c(1e-10, 1e-5, 1e-3, 1e-1)
tmp = full_summary %>% filter(is_keystone) %>% select(rel_pop_initial)

counts = numeric(length(thresholds))
for(i in seq_along(thresholds)) {
  counts[i] = sum(tmp$rel_pop_initial >= thresholds[i])/nrow(tmp)
}

plt = data.frame(threshold = factor(as.character(thresholds)), proportion = counts) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = threshold, y = proportion, fill = threshold)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
    labs(x = "Relative Abundance >= Threshold", y = "Proportion of valid simulations") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), legend.position = "none")

path = '/mnt/data/sur/users/mrivera/Plots/Boosted_keys/Relative-thresholds.png'
ggsave(path, plot = plt, width = 12, height = 5)
```

![Figure 5: Relative abundance thresholds](/mnt/data/sur/users/mrivera/Plots/Boosted_keys/Relative-thresholds.png)

# Run correlation analysis
```{r, eval=FALSE}
# Correlation analysis
full_summary[is.na(full_summary)] <- 0

library(GGally)
cols = c("keystoneness", "dissimilarity", "prop_extinctions", "rel_pop_initial")
plt = GGally::ggpairs(full_summary, columns = cols, title = "Correlation Analysis", upper = list(continuous = "cor"), lower = list(continuous = "points")) 

path = '/mnt/data/sur/users/mrivera/Plots/Boosted_keys/Correlation_Analysis.png'
ggsave(path, plot = plt, width = 8, height = 6)
```

![Figure 6: Correlation Analysis](/mnt/data/sur/users/mrivera/Plots/Boosted_keys/Correlation_Analysis.png)

# Keystone column distribution
```{r, eval=FALSE}
interactions_dir = '/mnt/data/sur/users/mrivera/Controls/Boosted_keystone/Interactions'
experiment_dir = '/mnt/data/sur/users/mrivera/Controls/Boosted_keystone'

simulation_parameters = data.table::fread(paste0(dir, "/simulation-params.tsv"), select = c("id", "key"))
i =1
process_interactions <- function(i) {
  #------------------------
  # Generate path
  row <- simulation_parameters[i, ]
  id <- row$id
  key <- as.numeric(row$key)
  interactions_file_path <- paste0(interactions_dir, paste0("/A_", id, ".feather"))
  #------------------------
  # Load table
  interactions <- arrow::read_feather(interactions_file_path, col_select = key) 
  table = data.frame(
    'positive' = sum(interactions > 0),
    'negative' = sum(interactions < 0),
    'zero' = sum(interactions == 0)
  )
  table
}
# process_interactions(i)
results <- mclapply(1:nrow(simulation_parameters), process_interactions, mc.cores = detectCores() - 1)
inters_summary <- do.call(rbind, results) %>% mutate(total = positive + negative ) 

#--------------------------
# Plotting code
plt <- inters_summary %>% count(zero) %>% mutate(pct = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = zero, y = pct)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", alpha = 0.6, fill = "steelblue") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::number_format(accuracy = 0.01)) +
  labs(x = "Zero Interactions", y = "Proportion", title = "Distribution of Zero Interactions")

path = '/mnt/data/sur/users/mrivera/Plots/Boosted_keys/Interactions_distribution.png'
ggsave(path, plot = plt, width = 12, height = 5)
```

![Figure 7: Distribution of Zero Interactions](/mnt/data/sur/users/mrivera/Plots/Boosted_keys/Interactions_distribution.png)

# Disconnection analysis
```{r, eval=FALSE}

dir = '/mnt/data/sur/users/mrivera/Controls/Boosted_keystone'
interactions_dir = paste0(dir, "/Interactions")
simulation_parameters = data.table::fread(paste0(dir, "/simulation-params.tsv"), select = c("id", "p_noint"))


library(dplyr)
library(parallel)
library(igraph)

process_row <- function(i) {
  #------------------------
  # Generate path
  row <- simulation_parameters[i, ]
  id <- row$id
  p_noint <- as.numeric(row$p_noint)
  A_file_path <- paste0(interactions_dir, paste0("/A_", id, ".feather"))
  #------------------------
  # Read interactions file
  g <- arrow::read_feather(A_file_path) %>% as.matrix() %>% graph_from_adjacency_matrix(mode = "directed", weighted = TRUE)
  table <- data.frame(
    'is_connected' = is_connected(g),
    'p_noint' = p_noint
  )
  table
}

results <- mclapply(1:nrow(simulation_parameters), process_row, mc.cores = detectCores() - 1)
connected_table <- do.call(rbind, results)
#-------------------------------------------
# Section: Generate plot
library(ggplot2)
plt = connected_table %>% group_by(p_noint) %>% summarise(proportion_connected = sum(is_connected)/n()) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(p_noint), y = proportion_connected)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", alpha = 0.6, color = "black", fill = "steelblue") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(x = "p_noint", y = "Proportion of Connected Networks", title = "Network Connectivity by p_noint") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), legend.position = "none")

path = '/mnt/data/sur/users/mrivera/Plots/Boosted_keys/Disconnection.png'
ggsave(path, plot = plt, width = 12, height = 5)
```


![Figure 8: Disconnection analysis](/mnt/data/sur/users/mrivera/Plots/Boosted_keys/Disconnection.png)
